author: Alder Nodes
msg:
I've noticed that my farm of 10 TCL IONZ devices (full phones) have been averaging around $0.30/day while the my farm of 20 Samsung S20 farm (motherboard-only) have been averaging around $0.08/day. 

Is it possible they are penalizing motherboard phone farms since they're not real phones? Is there any way for them to detect the difference between real phones and motherboard devices?

author: Alder Nodes
msg: I'm going to try turning off 10 of the S20 devices and see if rewards improve for the S20 farm box
